page.title: Calendar Sync
page.subtitle: Connect your CT Scan department shift schedule directly to the calendar app on your phone or personal device
page.secureDescription: This link is unique to your account and contains a unique security token. When any schedule change occurs or you're assigned an emergency on-call shift, your calendar app will update appointments automatically without needing to log into the system.

card.urlDescription: Use this link to sync your schedule with your phone calendar. The schedule will update automatically when any change occurs.
card.updateNote: Updates depend on your calendar app and may take from minutes to hours

google: Open Google Calendar on your computer
From the sidebar, click "+" next to "Other calendars"
Your schedule will appear within minutes
apple: Open the Calendar app on iPhone or Mac
Go to Settings > Accounts > Add Account
Updates will sync automatically every few hours
outlook: Enter a name for the calendar (e.g. "Radiology Schedule")
